title: 🔐 Multi-Signature Governance Template
content:
# 🔐 Multi-Signature Governance Template

Template for implementing Roundtable Multi-Signature Governance with exponential security scaling.
Six Sacred Tongues
The protocol operates on six orthogonal communication domains:
KO (Kor'aelin): Control & Intent — orchestration, delegation, high-level coordination
AV (Avali): I/O & Messaging — transport, routing, inter-agent communication
RU (Runethic): Policy & Constraints — state binding, governance, execution boundaries
CA (Cassisivadan): Logic & Computation — math operations, algorithms, data transformation
UM (Umbroth): Security & Secrets — encryption, redaction, key rotation, access control
DR (Draumric): Types & Schema — data structures, message formats, semantic validation
Security Tier Configuration
Tier | Tongues Required | Signatures | Security Multiplier | Use Cases |
